transcript: te瑟k 蓹d藞v忙nt瑟d蕭 蕦v
definitions: To make good use of an opportunity.
To exploit someone or something for one's own benefit, often unfairly.
examples: She decided to take advantage of the sale prices.
He felt his boss was taking advantage of his willingness to work overtime.
We should take advantage of the good weather and go for a hike.
